title: Cobblemon Battle Tower 1-6-1
description: An endgame Battle Tower mod for Cobblemon.
body: ### [Please consider supporting me on ko-fi if you like the mod and can afford it, I appreciate even 1 dollar. ](https://ko-fi.com/raguto) --- _**I grant permission to anyone seeking to add my mod to a modpack**_ --- ## Cobblemon Battle Tower A competitive battle challenge mod for Cobblemon. Fight through progressively harder floors with your locked-in team and earn Battle Points to spend in the shop. --- ### Features: **Battle Modes** - Singles (1v1) - Doubles (2v2) - Co-op Doubles (2Players VS NPC) **Progressive Difficulty** - 30+ floors with scaling AI difficulty > Floors 1-5 (npc can't use gimmicks, has 20 different teams) > Floors 5-10 (npc can use tera, has 15 different teams) > Floors 10-15 (npc can use tera + dynamax, has 10 different teams) > Floors 15-30 (npc can use all gimmicks, has 30 different teams) > Floors 30+ (npc can use all gimmicks, has 50 different teams) - Item usage limits increase with floor progression - AI gimmick restrictions by floor (Tera, Dynamax, Mega) - Competitive movesets and strategies **Level Modes** - Level 50: All Pokemon scaled to level 50 - Level 100: All Pokemon scaled to level 100 **Team System** - Lock in your team at the start of a run - Team validation prevents mid-run changes - Optional legendary restrictions (reduces BP rewards to 1 per floor) **Battle Points Shop** 70+ items available including: - Ability Patch, Booster Energy - Rare Candy, Exp Candies (all sizes) - PP Max, Vitamins, EV reducing berries - IV Candies (all 12 types) - Type Gems (all 18 types) - Mega Stone, Blank Z-Crystal, Max Mushroom - Legendary items (orbs, crystals, masks, etc.) - Evolution items, Zygarde components - Master Ball, Ancient Origin Ball, Cherish Ball - Relic Coin Sack, Star Core **Leaderboards** - Tracking players highest floors - Tracking best streaks - Tracking if legendaries were used in the record with a gold (L) on the name **Language Support** 14 different languages **Customizable Trainer Skins:** Put 64x64 player skins in config/cobblemon_battle_tower_skins/ battle Tower trainers will randomly use custom skins in the skins folder **Configs:** bp_per_floor - Adjust bp rewards bp_shop_items - Adjust bp shop listings config.json - Adjust runcooldown, Legendary usage, banned pokemon list itemusage - Adjust floor item usage skins - Add skins in folder for the NPC **Commands:** /bt reload - Reloads config files /bt give [player] - Give BP to yourself or another player /bt setfloor - Set your current floor /bt resetleaderboard - Reset all leaderboard stats /bt runcooldown [seconds] - Adds cooldown between runs /bt reset [playername] - Resets specific players leaderboard score. /bt leaderboard [format] [top10/25/50/100] - Displays leaderboard scores in chat **Requirements & Supports:** [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) 1.6.1 [RCT API](https://modrinth.com/mod/rctapi) 0.13.7+ [Cobblemon Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown) (for legendary items and gimmicks)
